channel.title: +Image on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Image on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Scanner
item.description: Android Phone VFlat Adobe scanner Camscanner IPEVO v4k IPEVO V4K Ultra High Definition 8MP Amazon Usage Bought 15 Nov 2021. Taiwanese. Spent about 16k INR. Used rarely. Hardware A good and sturdy stand for the 4k camera. No LED light. There is an embedded mike (Speaking distance - 11.8" to 27.6"). An LED indicator - shows if the feed is on. Buttons Auto-Focus Press once to focus. Auto-Focus mode button AutoFocus-Single (AF-S) or AutoFocus-Continuous (AF-C).
